revision.comment:
[[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「
* {{Pathnav|文化|イベント|テーマ別のイベント}} * {{Pathnav|産業|農林水産業|農業}}
[[農業]]に関…」
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|文化|イベント|テーマ別のイベント}} * {{Pathnav|産業|農林水産業|農業}}
[[農業]]に関する[[イベント]]のカテゴリ。 [[Category:テーマ別のイベント|のうきよう]] [[Category:農業|いへんと]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|文化|イベント|テーマ別のイベント}} * {{Pathnav|産業|農林水産業|農業}} }}
[[農業]]に関する[[イベント]]のカテゴリ。
{{translated page|ja|Category:農業に関するイベント]]|version=85430554}} [[ja:Category:農業に関するイベント]]
==Old Content==
(2025-05-15T18:26:09Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Otaue Festival]].
[[ja:Category:農業に関するイベント]] {{translated page|ja|Category:農業に関するイベント|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Agriculture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Events by subject]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "=="
Text replacement - "(2025-05-" to "=="
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:農業に関するイベント]] to [[Category:Agricultural events]]: Merge [[Category:農業に関するイベント]] into [[Category:Agricultural events]] via bot
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q46391442)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|文化|イベント|テーマ別のイベント}}
* {{Pathnav|産業|農林水産業|農業}}
}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:農業に関するイベント|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:農業に関するイベント|version=85430554}}
{{wikidata link|Q46391442}}
<!--interwikis-->

<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Otaue Festival]]
[[Category:Agriculture]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Categories to be renamed]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Events by subject]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
